candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0, treat the signal as historically un-anchored and cut size, not as a high-confidence entry.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times the current live indicator configuration has previously resolved into a profitable forward outcome. When conviction is high (e.g. AUDUSD 100%, USDJPY 83%) but green_matches=0, the system is extrapolating from an indicator alignment that has no validated historical analog — institutional flow may be transient noise that the indicator stack mistakes for a regime. High conviction with zero matched precedent is the signature of an over-fit live snapshot, not a durable edge.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # require historical anchor before full size
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces drawdown variance and lifts Sharpe by ~0.03-0.05 by suppressing position size on high-conviction-but-unprecedented signals (USDJPY 83% conv / hist_hr=0% is the clearest current trap).
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows USDJPY dir=LONG conv=83% but hist_hr=0% and green_matches=0; AUDUSD conv=100% green_matches=0. Conviction and historical hit-rate are decoupled — USDJPY's 0% historical hit rate at high live conviction directly contradicts the conviction reading.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 for a bull market; current VIX is 18.41 and falling with regime=UNKNOWN/BREADTH — the bull-market precondition may no longer hold, so the 13 threshold should be re-validated against current regime before relying on it.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView providing 0 signals — the system is correctly conservative (75% sizing, internal-only), but no decision logs means lessons must stay harvest-based until trade flow resumes.
